name: codecharter
description: Turn a codebase into a deterministic 2D map with geohash addresses and agent activity hooks.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && cp public/index.html public/style.css dist/public/ && cp package.json dist/package.json
scripts.prepack: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && cp public/index.html public/style.css dist/public/ && cp package.json dist/package.json
